title: Miniature Coal
description: This is a simple mod that adds Mini variants for coal and charcoal.
body:
this mod adds miniature coal and charcoal and fuel related stuff.

currently addedin V1.0.1-1.20.4:
- miniature coal * charcoal - smelts 1 item for one piece crafted from one piece of coal/charcoal and gets 9/ miniature coal/miniature charcoal

- Blaze clay ball (crafting item only) - crafting in a 2x2 or 3x3 four balls make 1 blaze clay block.

- blaze clay block (crafting item only) - crafted in a 2x2 or 3x3 one block makes 4 blaze clay balls

- blaze clay brick (item) - blaze clay balls can only be smelted in blast furnace and the brick is a fuel item that last 30 item smelted at once.

made by GamingOnInsulin.
any questions and/or suggestion please send them to the issue page!
